subtitle: Review capability coverage and observable outcomes before translating them into requirements.

sections.title: Capability Areas at a Glance
sections.label: Capabilities
sections.why: Lead with the stable capability map before story detail.

sections.title: Story Anchors and Observable Outcomes
sections.label: Story Anchors
sections.why: Keep the highest-value behaviors and outcomes scannable.

sections.title: Boundary and Failure Coverage
sections.label: Boundary Coverage
sections.why: Show where visible edge and failure behavior is covered.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the approval calls that lock the story set.

sections.title: Story Gaps and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Gaps
sections.why: Expose vague or missing story coverage before it distorts requirements.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie approval claims to exact story evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show validation status for stories and approval view.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what requirements may now treat as settled behavior.
